task.title: Write a body rule to check document structure
task.shortdesc: Body rules check the content of your Markdown documents — headings, sections, paragraph structure, and text patterns. They use XPath expressions to query the rendered HTML. Test your XPath expressions in the REPL before adding them to a rule.

othermeta.name: description
othermeta.content: Write a markdown-validator body rule using XPath to check document structure: headings, required sections, element counts, and text patterns.

ul.li: You have an existing rule set file. See Create a rule set file.
The interactive REPL is available for XPath testing. See Start the interactive REPL.

context.p: Always test your XPath in the REPL before committing a body rule. Before writing queries that rely on within-section containment, read Known limitations (flat DOM caveat).

step.cmd: Identify the structural property you want to check.

ul.li: The document has exactly one H1
A specific H2 section heading is present (for example, "Prerequisites")
The H1 starts with a required prefix
The H1 is under a character limit
The body contains at least one code block

step.cmd: Write an XPath expression that selects the element you want to check.

info.p: Common XPath patterns for Markdown documents:

step.cmd: Test your XPath expression in the REPL before adding it to the rule set.

info.codeblock: md-validate repl > load docs/sample-tutorial.md > query //h2[normalize-space(text())='Prerequisites'] count
info.p: Confirm the query returns the expected result. See Test a rule in the REPL for the full testing workflow.

step.cmd: Choose the flag based on what aspect of the XPath result you want to evaluate.

row.entry: The text content of the first matched element
The HTML tag names of matched elements
The full plain text of the entire body

step.cmd: Add the body rule object to the body array in your rule set file.

info.codeblock: { "id": 5, "name": "must-have-prerequisites-section", "type": "body", "query": "//h2[normalize-space(text())='Prerequisites']", "flag": "count", "operation": ">", "value": "0", "level": "Required", "mitigation": "Add a '## Prerequisites' section to the document." }

step.cmd: Validate sample documents to confirm the rule behaves correctly.

info.codeblock: md-validate validate docs/sample-with-prereqs.md --rules rules/tutorial.json md-validate validate docs/sample-without-prereqs.md --rules rules/tutorial.json

step.stepresult: The document with the section passes rule 5; the document without it fails with your mitigation message.
